tasks.title: Rename _NEW CV to final filename once old PDF is closed
tasks.notes: CV has been regenerated with all 8 fixes applied. Output is output/cv_archive/Inon_Baasov_CV_Elbit_2026_NEW.pdf. Owner must close the old PDF in their viewer, then either: (A) rename _NEW to Inon_Baasov_CV_Elbit_2026.pdf manually, or (B) simply re-run 'python scripts/generate_elbit_cv.py' — OUTPUT path is now fixed back to the final filename. Verify one-page layout before sending.

tasks.title: Submit CV to Elbit Systems and log contact details
tasks.notes: Once CV is finalised and renamed, Cole to: (1) identify the hiring manager or recruiter name for the Elbit Learning Dept PM role, (2) guide Owner through submission, (3) log all contact details in output/cv_archive/cv_archive.db applications table (contact_name, contact_email, submission_date, source_url). Owner to supply contact name once identified.

tasks.title: Owner pushes framework to GitHub after setting up PAT
tasks.notes: All 45 files are committed locally in 3 commits. Push requires GitHub PAT. Full instructions in scripts/github_setup_guide.md. Owner must: (1) store PAT via Windows Credential Manager OR add to .env file, (2) run 'git push origin master' from D:/Claude Playground terminal. Mack to verify push succeeded and confirm remote is in sync.

tasks.title: Create 'Website-product-portfolio' GitHub repo and wire up migration
tasks.blocked_by: GITHUB-001 + Owner must create repo at github.com/new + Base44 source access needed
tasks.notes: Owner creates repo at github.com/new — name: 'Website-product-portfolio', no README init. Then: (1) Owner confirms Base44 source access (check Base44 project settings > Export), (2) Mack sets up remote and push pipeline. See scripts/github_setup_guide.md Step 4.

tasks.title: Implement WhatsApp bridge
tasks.notes: Three options documented in scripts/whatsapp_setup_guide.md. RECOMMENDED START: Option 1 — 'npx claude-code-whatsapp' (5 min, scan QR, done). Owner must have Node.js installed ('node --version' to check). If Owner wants full framework integration, Mack builds custom MCP server (Option 3, 2-3 hrs) using @whiskeysockets/baileys. Mack to confirm Node.js version and guide Owner through QR scan on next session.

tasks.title: CRITICAL: Remove 'CHOOSE YOUR PHOTO' dev widget from production
tasks.notes: Widget exposes internal versioning UI to public visitors. Conditionally render only for authenticated owner or remove entirely. Requires Base44 project access to edit source.

tasks.title: CRITICAL: Fix page title — remove internal agent name 'Andy'
tasks.notes: Change from 'Home | Andy — App' to 'Inon Baasov | Product Leader · Co-Founder · CPO'. Fix in index.html <title> and any meta og:title tags.

tasks.title: HIGH: Full awwwards-level visual redesign implementation
tasks.blocked_by: Needs Base44 source access. Pre-work: WEBSITE-001-UX-03 and WEBSITE-001-COPY-01 must be done first
tasks.notes: Full spec in design_brief_WEBSITE-001.md. Key implementation: dark bg #080E1A, cyan #00B4D8, Syne ExtraBold + Inter fonts, Lenis smooth scroll (duration 1.2), GSAP ScrollTrigger reveals (y:40 opacity:0 -> 0 1 duration:0.8), particle hero, magnetic cursor, horizontal portfolio scroll, number counter animation on stats.

tasks.title: HIGH: Replace emoji icons in portfolio cards with real visuals
tasks.notes: Design or source product screenshots, custom SVG icons, or branded visuals for all 6 portfolio cards (TouchE TV, AiRakoon, Medicrowd, Smash+, Arena Plus, Blau Pharma). Deliver final assets or detailed asset spec to Rex.

tasks.title: MEDIUM: Sharpen hero value proposition and bio copy
tasks.notes: Add a differentiator sentence to hero. Rewrite bio to be more specific — reference AI-first products, $2.5M raised, Technion, current consulting work. Avoid generic CPO boilerplate. Deliver copy document to Rex for implementation.

tasks.title: HIGH: Add contact form to reduce PII exposure
tasks.notes: Phone and email are plaintext in DOM. Add a contact form as primary CTA. Fields: Name, Email, Message, Send. Optionally obfuscate direct email/phone display.

tasks.title: HIGH: Full security header and cookie audit
tasks.notes: Audit CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, cookie flags (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite). Produce written security report in scratchpad/security_audit_WEBSITE-001.md. Rex does NOT deploy redesign until Maya signs off.

tasks.title: HIGH: Add SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and structured data
tasks.notes: Add meta description, og:title, og:description, og:image, Twitter Card tags, Schema.org Person markup (name, jobTitle, alumniOf Technion, sameAs LinkedIn). Target keywords: 'Product Leader Israel', 'CPO hire', 'AI product manager Israel'.

tasks.title: HIGH: Add testimonials section (2-3 quotes)
tasks.blocked_by: Owner must supply 2-3 quotes with name and role
tasks.notes: Place after Portfolio section. Design: card layout with large quote mark, name, role, company. Owner to supply content — co-founder from TouchE TV, investor, or client reference. Drop content in owner_inbox/ once ready.

tasks.title: HIGH: Audit and fix all 'Deep Dive' portfolio links
tasks.notes: Verify all 6 portfolio card deep-dive links. Build minimal stub case study pages or hide/remove broken links. Document which pages exist vs. which need to be built in scratchpad/.

tasks.title: MEDIUM: Add downloadable CV button
tasks.notes: Add download CV button near hero CTAs. Link to hosted PDF (host in GitHub repo once GITHUB-002 is complete). Requires final approved CV file.

tasks.title: MEDIUM: Scroll-triggered animations and stat counters
tasks.notes: Animate number counters on stats (10+, $2.5M, 38%, 6) using GSAP CountTo or IntersectionObserver. Add fade-in on scroll for all major sections. Part of WEBSITE-001-DESIGN-01 implementation.

tasks.title: MEDIUM: Minimal contact form
tasks.notes: Fields: Name, Email, Message, Send. Style consistent with redesign. Can use mailto: fallback if no backend yet. Ties into WEBSITE-001-SEC-03.

tasks.title: Migrate website source to 'Website-product-portfolio' GitHub repo
tasks.blocked_by: GITHUB-002 + Owner Base44 export access confirmation
tasks.notes: Once GITHUB-002 repo is created and Base44 source is accessible: (1) export/clone Base44 project source, (2) clean up and structure as clean React repo, (3) push to Website-product-portfolio GitHub repo, (4) wire up Vercel or GitHub Pages deploy if desired. Mack leads; Rex implements.

tasks.title: Draft first LinkedIn thought leadership post for Owner approval
tasks.notes: Sage to draft a 150-250 word LinkedIn post on a topic relevant to Inon's positioning (AI in enterprise learning, product leadership in regulated industries, or CPO lessons from 0-to-scale). Draft goes to owner_inbox/LINKEDIN-001_draft.md for Owner review and explicit approval before any publishing action. Do NOT publish without Owner saying 'approved'.

tasks.title: LOW: Mobile responsiveness audit at 375px and 768px
tasks.notes: Test on simulated iOS Safari (375px) and Android Chrome (768px) viewports. Document all layout breakage in scratchpad/mobile_audit_WEBSITE-001.md. Vera signs off before Rex deploys redesign.

tasks.title: LOW: Accessibility audit — contrast, ARIA, keyboard nav
tasks.notes: Run Lighthouse accessibility audit. Check WCAG 2.1 AA: contrast ratios min 4.5:1, all interactive elements keyboard accessible, ARIA labels on icons and CTAs, skip-to-main link. Document findings in scratchpad/a11y_audit_WEBSITE-001.md.

tasks.title: LOW: Design thought leadership section (blog / talks / press)
tasks.blocked_by: Owner must supply content — articles, talks, or press links
tasks.notes: Design section layout and component spec. Section should be clean card grid. Requires Owner content before implementation. Drop links/articles in owner_inbox/ when ready.
